title: Body-Worn Camera Footage and Records – Jan 22, 2026, Officer-Involved Shooting (Jaque Rabon) (San Bernardino County Sheriff)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear Public Information Officer,

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act (Government Code Section 7920.000 et seq.), and specifically expanded transparency mandates under Penal Code Section 832.7 (Senate Bill 1421) and Government Code Section 7923.625 (Assembly Bill 748), I am requesting public records related to the lethal use of force encounter on January 22, 2026, at approximately 10:00 A.M. at 3782 Tyler Street, Riverside, CA, involving decedent Jaque Rabon.

I request the following specific records:

- Video and Audio Recordings: All body-worn camera (BWC) footage, dashboard camera footage, and audio recordings capturing the encounter, radio communications before, during, and after the incident, as well as the immediate events leading up to and following the discharge of lethal force.

- 911 and Dispatch Logs: All radio transmissions, computer-aided dispatch (CAD) logs, and audio recordings of dispatch communications regarding this incident.

- Investigative Reports: All initial incident reports, supplemental reports, deputy narratives, use-of-force reports, supervisory reviews, and other records generated, maintained, or possessed by the your agency relating to this incident.

Names and Badge Numbers: The identification of all deputies involved. This includes first, middle, and last names, ranks, badge numbers, and assignments, to the extent disclosure is required under Penal Code Section 832.7.

Critical Incident Package: Any critical incident briefing materials, press releases, public summaries, scene diagrams, photographs, and evidentiary materials prepared.

Per Government Code Section 7923.625, the statutory 45-day window for public disclosure of critical incident video has elapsed. If the Department asserts that disclosure would substantially interfere with an active investigation, please provide the factual basis supporting that determination, identify each withheld record, state the specific statutory exemption relied upon, and provide the date on which the Department expects the interference to cease and the records to be released. If portions of any responsive records are exempt from disclosure, please redact only the exempt portions and release all reasonably segregable non-exempt material. Pursuant to Government Code Sections 7922.535 and 7922.540, please provide a determination regarding this request within the statutory timeframe.
Please provide all responsive materials in native electronic format to avoid duplication fees. If fees are required, please notify me in advance if the total exceeds $20.

Thank you,

Inland Empire Legal Literacy Project

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jaz Williams

title: Martin Muniz Quadruple Homicide Investigation Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I request all releasable public records related to the homicide investigation involving Martin Muniz and the January 13, 2023 quadruple homicide near Mack Court and West 37th Street in Cleveland, Ohio.

Please include:

* Body-worn camera footage
* Dash camera footage
* 911 calls and recordings
* CAD/dispatch logs
* Incident reports
* Arrest reports
* Detective reports and supplemental reports, if releasable
* Crime scene photographs, if releasable
* Witness statements, if releasable
* Audio recordings of police radio communications

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

If there are any fees associated with this request, please notify me in advance before processing.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage

title: High-Speed Pursuit Body Camera and Dash Camera Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Ohio Public Records Act, I request all releasable public records related to vehicle pursuits, high-speed chases, or fleeing and eluding incidents occurring between January 1, 2025 and the present. This request includes:

Body-worn camera footage
Dash camera footage
CAD/dispatch logs
Incident reports
Arrest reports
911 calls, if applicable
Pursuit review documents, if available

I request that all records be provided electronically if available.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

SAD Footage
